summary: The session focused on implementing export options and defining the structure of a commercial appraisal report, including detailed outlines for various sections and sub-sections. The user requested templates to facilitate the completion of specific sections, particularly the Income Approach.
facts: The user is developing a web-based commercial appraisal report writing application. The user requested steps to implement export options for appraisal reports in formats like PDF, Word, and Excel. The user sought a detailed outline of a typical commercial appraisal report, including eight main sections and their sub-sections. The user specifically requested further sectioning of the Income Approach section, leading to the creation of detailed sub-sections. The user asked for a template for the "Overview of the income approach and the capitalization rate used" sub-section. The user also requested a template for the "Analysis of the rent roll, operating expenses, and vacancy rate" sub-section of the Income Approach section.
